content.en:
Origin Boundary Sea, Picture City.

This is the second address given by the fourth senior sister Xue Nu, and a place with a lot of fame, much more famous than Tongyang Mountain, there are many eternal controllers here, and it is the only city composed of eternal controllers.

How rare it is for the Eternal Masters to be inhabited by the Eternal Masters, and how exaggerated it is to see how many people live in this city.

Of course, this is not the territory of one Eternal Master, and no one has completely occupied it.

The reason why it attracts so many eternal masters here is naturally because of the Boundary River Monument, and there is more than one Boundary River Monument, because there are many Boundary River Monuments here.

There is a seven-realm level master's inheritance in the picture city, this one took the initiative to leave the inheritance, and took out all the dozens of boundary river tablets he had obtained in his life as a reward, everyone can get this reward, provided that he collects the key he released.

This Seven Realms level master is called the old man of Guishan, and he has a very bad taste, he was originally given a certain death, but in fact he can live for a long time, so he arranged it for a long time and built the Tuta.

Tuta connects multiple time and space, enters the time and space where Tuta is located, and passes through some levels to obtain key fragments, and the key fragments obtained in different levels are different.

Once you have collected all the pieces of the key, you can form a truly perfect key, and you can obtain a Boundary Monument, which can be taken directly from the Tuta.

The real key is composed of 365 fragments, but a certain 108 key fragments can be combined into small keys, and can also be exchanged for some precious rewards and resources.

After all, what the old man of Guishan left behind was not only the boundary river monument, but also many resources, treasures, etc., which could also be exchanged.

It is not clear how many key fragments there are in the tuta, it is almost endless, and many Eternal Masters are bored and come here to collect key fragments, and even exchange them with each other for the key fragments they need.

If you're lucky, you'll be able to get a little key.

As for the perfect key, it was very difficult, but over the years, someone still got it together and obtained the boundary monument from the Tuta.

Ye Tian came to Tucheng, learned about these situations, and felt that this Tuta collecting key fragments was like some small games on the earth, but the years were too long, and his memories of the earth were a little blurred.

"This old man of Turtle Mountain really has a bad taste, this is to let a large number of eternal masters play games here!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In his opinion, the purpose of many Eternal Masters in Tucheng is not to obtain the Boundary River Monument, but more to obtain key fragments.

Many Eternal Masters have not been able to progress for an endless period of time, and in fact they don't expect to progress anymore, and if they don't have some fun, they'll be boring.

Many of the Eternal Masters were too bored and went straight to sleep.

Therefore, it is not bad to have such a city as Tucheng.

......

"There are 365 key fragments, and if you collect them all, it is very difficult, and the larger the serial number, the easier it is to collect and the lowest value. "

Ye Tian learned that the No. 1 key fragment was the rarest, and there were only a few dozen in total, followed by the No. 2 key fragment, and there were very few key fragments with integer serial numbers.

In addition, if you collect 36 key fragments and 72 key fragments, you can turn it into a treasure box, and if you put the treasure box in the tuta, you can open a random treasure.

Of course, after opening, the treasure box disappears, and these key fragments collected will also be taken away by Tuta.

The 36 serial key fragments are combined to form a small treasure box, and the 72 serial keys are combined to form a large treasure box.

To craft a small key, you must obtain key fragment number two, and to craft a perfect key, you must collect key fragment number one.

"Interesting, indeed interesting!"

Ye Tian smiled.

From shop to shop in the city, some of the Eternal Masters are selling key fragments, which glow with eternal immortality and look extraordinary.

The price of these key shards fluctuates, often affected by the number of other key shards in the city.

Key Fragments are sold by ordinary Eternal Masters, who know that resources are scarce, so they sell key fragments that they don't need or have excess.

Ye Tian looked at some stores, but he didn't buy them.

He can go to Tuta to collect key fragments himself, unless there is a real lack of some kind of key fragment that is difficult to collect, he will consider buying the missing key fragment.

"Let's go to Tuta first. "

Ye Tian walked towards Tuta.

Soon, he came to a tower that could not be seen in height, as if it ran through infinite time and space, and as if it was infinitely high.

"It's extraordinary, it's worthy of being a Tuta established by a Seven Realms-level master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the Origin Realm Sea, the number of controllers above the Seventh Realm level is very rare, and each of them is a big figure who is famous in the entire Origin Realm Sea.

For example, Ye Tian's four senior brothers and sisters are such characters.

Ye Tian walked into the Tuta, which was divided into an exchange area and a customs clearance area.

Ye Tian came directly to the pass area and fell in love with these level tasks.

The clearance area is very complicated, such as entering a place called the time and space of the beast, where there are many, many beasts, and there is a certain chance to get key fragments by killing the beast.

These treacherous beasts are special creatures derived from the rules created by the old man of Kameyama, and they are immortal and immortal in any time and space, even if they are killed now, they will be reborn after a period of time.

Unless the rules laid out by the old man of Kameyama are broken, these rules can be completely shattered and disappeared.

And those who are stronger than the old man of Turtle Mountain will naturally not be bored enough to do this kind of thing.

In short, the more powerful the beast, the better the chance of killing the key fragments.

Of course, every long time, the time and space of the beast will be opened once, and a large number of eternal masters will enter it, and there will be a certain danger in this process, if it falls in the time and space of the beast, it will really fall.

Therefore, there are still few eternal masters who dare to enter the fight.

In addition to the time and space of the beast, there is also the Combat Power Tower, according to the strength, there is no danger, every time you break through a layer, you will definitely get a key fragment, which is also the easiest place to get a key fragment.

......

Ye Tian watched all the levels where he could get key fragments, and he knew it in his heart.

"Let's go to the Combat Power Tower first and get some key shards!"

Ye Tian decided.
